entities.name: Job boards
entities.context: High volume, low price recruiting method (~$500/posting)

entities.name: Recruiters
entities.context: High touch, high fee recruiting method (20-25% of salary or $50-100K+)

entities.name: Market bifurcation
entities.context: Recruiting market has two extremes with no middle option

entities.name: Premium positioning
entities.context: Quality + service based strategy, currently underexplored in recruiting

relationships.context: Job boards represent the low-cost end of the bifurcated market
Recruiters represent the high-cost end of the bifurcated market
Premium positioning addresses the gap created by market bifurcation
